meta.title: Our Wedding Anniversary — A Quiet Moment in Everything
meta.description: A private digital love story. A quiet space to remember, feel, and return to.
meta.ogDescription: A private digital love story crafted with quiet intention.

hero.title: A Quiet Moment in Everything
hero.subtitle: Years of choosing each other, in silence and in light.

items.title: The beginning was quiet.
items.text: No thunder. No spectacle. Just two people who found it easy to be still together.

items.title: A promise, softly spoken.
items.text: We did not need grandeur. We needed certainty. And in that quiet moment, we chose the same future.

items.title: We became each other’s home.
items.text: The day was beautiful because it was real. Vows, light, and the calm knowing that we had already begun.

items.title: Love, in lowercase letters.
items.text: It lives in coffee shared in silence, in hands that reach without asking, in choosing each other again before sleep.

videos.sectionSubtitle: A glimpse of us in motion
videos.caption: Our story, unfolding

letter.salutation: To the one I come home to,
paragraphs: There are things I have said to you a thousand times, and things I have never found the right moment to say. This letter is for the quiet second kind.

I do not measure our years in anniversaries. I measure them in the mornings I opened my eyes and felt safe. In the evenings when silence between us was not empty, but full. In the ordinary days that became extraordinary simply because you were in them.
You are not my better half. You are your own whole, and somehow that whole chose to walk beside mine. That is the miracle I never want to stop noticing.
If love is a language, ours does not shout. It whispers. It stays. It endures. And after all this time, it still feels like the truest thing I know.
letter.signature: Yours, in all the quiet ways

countdown.pretitle: Until we meet this day again
